_comment: Canonical claim-binding known-answer vector. SHARED, cross-language anti-drift fixture for proofmode-rust, proofmode-android (Kotlin), proofmode-ios (Swift) and proofsign-rust. Every implementation MUST reproduce these exact values. claim_binding = Base64Std(SHA-256(binding_bytes)). binding_bytes derivation rule (one rule for both payload types): c2pa = the base64-decoded claim bytes; csr = the PEM UTF-8 bytes (no decode). The device-request signature is an ECDSA-P256 DER signature over device_signature_payload. Do NOT edit any value here without updating every consumer in lockstep; this file is the durable anti-drift mechanism.
